title: ASR Outdoor Assorted Camo Design Paracord Bracelet Kit with Buckles 10ft Each
description:
Construct your own colored paracord bracelets with the ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Kit! This kit comes with 10 different colored camo pattern paracords, all of which are 10 feet in length. Each paracord length also comes with a matching buckle set so you can fasten your bracelet once you've constructed it. The cords are all made of 7 strands, ensuring their durability, and they have a pull capacity of 550lbs. This is a great kit for hiking, camping, boating, bug out bags and more!

ASR Outdoor Assorted Camo Design Paracord Bracelet Kit with Buckles 10ft Each

Construct your own colored paracord bracelets with the ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Kit!

Key Features

  • MAKES 10 BRACELETS - Set of Assorted Camo Colors | Bright Colors for Unique Look
  • 10 FEET OF PARACORD - Each Bracelet Unravels to 10 Feet of Paracord | Use for First Aid, Fishing and Securing
  • 550LBS PULL CAPACITY - Bracelets Will Support up to 550 Pounds | Great for Boating, Camping and Hiking
  • 7 STRAND CORDAGE - Made of 7 Durable and Strong Strands | Stands the Test of Time
  • MATCHING BUCKLES - Set Comes with 10 Colored Buckles to Complete Bracelets

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROPBK10PC
  • UPC: 060886303442
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: 10 ft
